title: Kafka & Billing Operations
description: Kafka consumer lag, bill-run duration, and invoice generation metrics for the Telco CRM billing domain (ADR-012, NFR-09).

panels.title: Kafka Consumer Lag by Group
panels.description: Records lag per consumer client and topic partition. Alert fires when lag exceeds 1 000 for 5 minutes (KafkaConsumerLagHigh). Sourced from kafka_consumer_fetch_manager_records_lag (Spring Kafka / Micrometer Kafka binder).

panels.title: Bill-Run Duration
panels.description: Placeholder — bill-run duration metric pending implementation.

options.content:
## Bill-Run Duration

This panel will display the end-to-end bill-run duration once the metric `billing_bill_run_duration_seconds` is published by **billing-service**.

**To implement:**
1. In `BillingService` or the saga coordinator, record a Micrometer `Timer` named `billing.bill_run.duration` (snake_case in Prometheus: `billing_bill_run_duration_seconds`).
2. Update this panel target to:
```
histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(billing_bill_run_duration_seconds_bucket[5m]))
```
3. Remove this text panel and replace it with a `timeseries` panel.

panels.title: Invoice Generation Count (total)
panels.description: Cumulative invoice generation count. Sourced from billing_invoice_generated_total — a custom Micrometer Counter to be published by billing-service upon each successful invoice creation.
